query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750010, 'What are the three types of parallelism in Hebrew poetry?', 'multiple_choice', '["Past, present, future","Synonymous, antithetic, synthetic","Beginning, middle, end","Literal, allegorical, moral"]', 'Synonymous, antithetic, synthetic', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'What types of psalms are mentioned in the lesson?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only praise psalms","Hymns, laments, thanksgiving, royal, wisdom, and imprecatory","Only laments","Only wisdom psalms"]', 'Hymns, laments, thanksgiving, royal, wisdom, and imprecatory', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'According to Proverbs 1:7, what is the beginning of knowledge?', 'multiple_choice', '["Education","Experience","The fear of the Lord","Human wisdom"]', 'The fear of the Lord', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'How should we understand proverbs?', 'multiple_choice', '["As absolute promises","As general principles for wise living","As commands","As prophecies"]', 'As general principles for wise living', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'What does Ecclesiastes explore?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only joy","Life''s meaning under the sun","Only suffering","Only worship"]', 'Life''s meaning under the sun', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'What does the book of Job address?', 'multiple_choice', '["Prosperity gospel","The problem of suffering","Only praise","Only prophecy"]', 'The problem of suffering', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'According to Luke 24:44, how should we read the Psalms?', 'multiple_choice', '["As mere poetry","Christologically, recognizing fulfillment in Christ","As historical records only","As entertainment"]', 'Christologically, recognizing fulfillment in Christ', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'What structural patterns are found in Hebrew poetry?', 'multiple_choice', '["Rhyme and meter","Acrostics and chiasm","Prose structure","None"]', 'Acrostics and chiasm', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'What is the conclusion of wisdom according to Ecclesiastes 12:13-14?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pursue pleasure","Fear God and keep His commandments","Seek wealth","Avoid suffering"]', 'Fear God and keep His commandments', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'How does poetry communicate meaning?', 'multiple_choice', '["Through plain statements only","Through artistry as well as content","Through hidden codes","Through allegory only"]', 'Through artistry as well as content', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750010, 'Explain how understanding Hebrew parallelism helps in interpreting the Psalms.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());
